ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "total_modules" INTEGER /* Total number of modules in the version */,
  "total_eloc" INTEGER /* Total effective lines of code (ELOC) in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., development, testing, released) */,
  "estimated_release_date" TEXT /* Estimated release date of the version */,
  "actual_release_date" TEXT /* Actual release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "bug_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs fixed in this version */,
  "feature_count" INTEGER /* Number of new features added in this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the developer belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the developer was hired */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the developer has */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* ID of the version the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the change or update */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., update, bug fix, new feature) */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the change */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_modules" TEXT /* List of modules affected by the change */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the change (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
